title: Alex's Diamond Carrot
description: Adds diamond carrots because i'm bored
body:
Welcome
------------------
Welcome to diamond carrots. This is a mod that adds a brand new magic food item: The diamond carrot. This is no ordinary carrot my friends, for it grants Haste, Speed, and Absorption upon consumption!

How to craft it?
------------------
This question brings us to the next feature, the diamond nugget. You can craft diamond nuggets by placing a diamond in a crafting table. After you've done this, you can put a golden carrot in the crafting table and surround it with four diamond nuggets. Boom! You have a diamond carrot.

Why would you want this mod?
------------------
Diamond carrots offer a new food item and a new way to defend yourself in a pinch! If you want more food items and more protection, download this mod!
